---
title: "Draft initial analyasis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
```



```{r}
library(readr)
df <- read_csv("~/fire_arm_checks/data/nics-firearm-background-checks.csv")


df <- df %>%
  mutate(month = ymd(paste0(month, "-01")))

df


```


# US Total Trends
 
```{r}
us_trend <- df %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(total_checks = sum(totals, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(month) %>%
  mutate(rolling_avg = zoo::rollmean(total_checks, k = 12, fill = NA, align = "right"))

ggplot(us_trend, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = total_checks), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling_avg), linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "US Firearm Background Checks Over Time",
       y = "Total Checks", x = "Year") +
  theme_minimal()
```


## Comparing Top States. 

```{r}

top_states <- df %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(totals)) %>%
  top_n(6, total) %>%
  pull(state)

df_top <- df %>%
  filter(state %in% top_states) %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  mutate(index = totals / first(totals) * 100)

ggplot(df_top, aes(x = month, y = index, color = state)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Standardised Trends Across Top States",
       y = "Index (Base = 100)", x = "Year") +
  theme_minimal()

```


## heatmap 


```{r}
heatmap_data <- df %>%
  mutate(year = year(month)) %>%
  group_by(state, year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(totals, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(heatmap_data, aes(x = year, y = reorder(state, total), fill = total)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  labs(title = "Heatmap of Background Checks by State and Year",
       x = "Year", y = "State") +
  theme_minimal()

```

## comparing dataframes 
```{r}
library(magrittr)
```


```{r}
df_compare <- df %>%
  mutate(
    permit_total = permit + permit_recheck,
    sales_total = handgun + long_gun + other + multiple
  ) %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarise(
    permit = sum(permit_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    sales = sum(sales_total, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(permit, sales), names_to = "type", values_to = "value")

ggplot(df_compare, aes(x = reorder(state, value), y = value, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Permit vs Sales-like Checks by State",
       x = "State", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

```



```{r}

features <- df %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_total = mean(totals, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_total = sd(totals, na.rm = TRUE),
    permit_share = mean((permit + permit_recheck) / totals, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  column_to_rownames("state")

```


```{r}
scaled_features <- scale(features)

set.seed(123)
kmeans_result <- kmeans(scaled_features, centers = 3)
```


```{r}
# fviz_cluster(kmeans_result, data = scaled_features,
             main = "Clustering of States Based on Background Check Behaviour")
```
